title: xanthisma spinulosum var. glaberrimum
intro: Xanthisma spinulosum var. glaberrimum, also known as a variety of the prickly goldeneye plant, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Xanthisma spinulosum var. glaberrimum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant are primarily related to its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing, making it a potential treatment for minor cuts and scrapes. Herbal preparations of Xanthisma spinulosum var. glaberrimum can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used in traditional folk medicine for their purported medicinal properties.
